This is a SaaS social feed aggregator project. Backend: Laravel API (multi-tenant, Sanctum auth). Frontend: Vue 3 (Vite, Composition API, Pinia, Tailwind CSS, Vue Router). Docker Compose for backend, frontend, and MySQL. Please generate code and instructions accordingly.
